untranslatable_reason: Signal requires rolling standard deviation calculation (2.5+ std dev from mean over 20-period window) and multi-timeframe momentum confirmation. Available indicators do not include raw standard deviation or explicit multi-timeframe momentum composite. Price position (price_pos_20) approximates extremes but cannot precisely measure statistical standard deviations. Multi-timeframe momentum confirmation is not expressible with single-timeframe indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using price_pos_20 (Donchian 20-period position): values <0.025 approximate 2.5+ std dev lows (reversion buy), values >0.975 approximate 2.5+ std dev highs (reversion sell). Target reversion to 1 std dev approximated as price_pos_20 crossing toward 0.5 (middle). However, this is a geometric approximation, not the actual statistical measure specified. Directional bias and multi-timeframe momentum cannot be encoded without additional indicators.
